com.pax.poslink

Class WebService

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.WebService

  • public class WebService
extends java.lang.Object
    This class implements communication with a Web server for getting the device IP address. the terminal will upload its IP address to this Web server, so the POSLink can get this IP value by sending SN & token.

        public WebService(java.lang.String baseUrl)

        value -
